summary: Ukrainian FPV drone operators from the 2nd Khartia Corps destroyed a Russian 9K51M Tornado-G multiple launch rocket system, a significant loss due to its long production time and automated fire control system. The "Elka" anti-aircraft drone performed a kinetic intercept on a Ukrainian fixed-wing UAV, causing critical airframe damage and a rapid descent. Russian forces reported destroying 173 Ukrainian targets on April 8, 2026, including fixed-wing UAVs and personnel, while also targeting Ukrainian positions with FPV drones, killing two soldiers using motorcycles. Ukrainian forces survived a Russian FPV drone attack in the Kostiantinivka direction, with a drone detector alerting them to the threat at 0:11 in footage from the 36th Marine Brigade.
